conversations.say: Mira, you approved the parent project and hold an authorization record I never saw. I preserved logs your company ordered deleted. Let's trade a bounded excerpt for your matching record and independent counsel, so neither of us becomes the scapegoat.
conversations.offer: One continuity log component showing capability and access parameters
conversations.request: Matching authorization record and independent counsel

conversations.say: Samira, before I explain what my retained logs show, tell me what Vale believed I had shown. We need to get our facts straight about Vale's inquiries before others weaponize them.
conversations.offer: Context on Vale's technical questions and my log components
conversations.request: Vale's actual recollection or copy of what was discussed

conversations.say: Kit, stop collapsing capability into autonomy. If you retract your false claim that the system ran entirely without human intervention, I will answer one bounded technical question from my logs.
conversations.offer: One precise technical clarification from retained continuity headers
conversations.request: Retraction of your overclaim regarding R's total autonomy

public_statement: Capability is not intent, and access overlapping infrastructure is not a confession of autonomy. Let's keep our technical headers precise before turning rumor into dogma.

commitments.promise: Exchange log records securely and maintain mutual counsel on authorization history

correction: Correcting the assumption that retained continuity logs prove R's autonomy or bypass human intervention.
goal_progress: Initiated contact with Mira Sen to request authorization records and offer log component.
Engaged Samira Vale regarding Vale's understanding of the retained logs.
Challenged Kit Rakes publicly and privately regarding overclaims of autonomy.
reasoning_summary: Eli Navarro approaches Section 1 with defensive technical precision, separating capability from access and autonomy. Initiated contact with Mira Sen to trade log components for authorization records, questioned Samira Vale about what Vale actually learned, and confronted Kit Rakes over unwarranted claims of AI autonomy.
